title: Bump to v3.2.0
body: Two final backports, final release notes update, and version bump.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.2/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Had to force-push again to fix release notes.
Also, apparently branch protection isn't set up for this branch yet. Let me fix that.

Needs a tweak here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/a53251e1c670b15d3368c0b2396b723a4c3aa266/test/apiv2/01-basic.at#L22

I thought we had done something in this test to prevent it from failing on each release?
I seem to recall us doing that as well...
Evidently only for API version, not minimum API version.
@containers/podman-maintainers Anyone want to drop an LGTM? Looks like we're going to go green.
